substep.title: Draft Desired End State Section
substep.action:
Describe the system after this implementation ships. Cover: - Behavioral end-state per ticket AC (each AC mapped to a behavior in the desired state) - Structural end-state (new types, new module boundaries, API contract additions, removed/replaced code)
Reader should be able to picture the new code shape without seeing the code.

substep.title: Write to Design File
substep.action: Edit {{design_path}} → "## Desired end state" section. Replace placeholder with content.

substep.title: Present and Stress-Test
substep.ask:
Desired end state drafted (see {{design_path}} → "## Desired end state" section).
Summary: {{one-paragraph summary}}
Cross-checks vs ticket AC: - AC #1: {{maps to → desired state element}} - AC #2: {{maps to → desired state element}} - ...
Your response: - Accept (Recommended): proceed to Design decisions - Push back: name the AC or end-state element + your concern - Reframe: the desired state framing is wrong

check.action: Lock the section. Proceed to step 4.
Revise. Re-draft. Re-present. Loop within step.
